title: Life History Tradeoffs
script_summary: Delving into life history tradeoffs reveals how organisms balance growth, reproduction, and survival.

segments.voiceover: What if your choices shaped your entire life?
Life history tradeoffs explain how organisms prioritize growth, reproduction, and survival.
Imagine a tree: it can grow tall or produce more seeds, but not both at once.
Research shows species adapt their strategies based on their environments, but it’s not always clear-cut.
Understanding these tradeoffs can help us appreciate the delicate balance of life.
Curious about more? Hit like and follow for deeper dives into science!
